TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Joe_Arlauckas, title = Joe_Arlauckas, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Joe_Arlauckas} }

S.FORM: Joe Arlauckas sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 7, Joe Arlauckas, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Joe Arlauckas sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 7, Joe Arlauckas, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oe arlauʦ~ʨkas~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *oe arlauʦ~ʨkas~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
